home_tagline: Full-stack engineer. .NET + React. Writing about it.
about_bio_1: I'm a full-stack engineer focused on TypeScript, React, and .NET — building products that feel fast and look intentional.
about_bio_2: I've spent the past few years working across the full stack — from polished frontend interfaces to well-structured APIs and reliable data layers. Developer experience matters as much as user experience.
about_bio_3: Outside of work I write about what I'm learning, contribute to open source, and occasionally build tools just for the joy of it.
blog_heading: Thoughts on code, design, and building things.
blog_description: Thoughts on code, design, and building things on the web.
projects_description: A selection of open-source work and side projects.
uses_description: The tools, hardware, and software I use daily.
contact_description: I'm best reached via email or LinkedIn.
